title: kagent values
description: Dependency-wrapper for the upstream kagent chart. Passes values through to the upstream subchart under the `kagent` key.

global.title: Global values
global.description: Helm global values propagated to the upstream subchart.

kagent.title: Upstream kagent passthrough
kagent.description: Values forwarded to the upstream kagent subchart (providers, per-agent enabled flags, tool server, etc.).
